description_long: This is a young adult woman dressed in practical, slightly rugged urban attire suitable for walking or light outdoor activity. She wears a fitted, long-sleeve shirt with a deep neckline and a laced-up front, tucked into belted, high-waisted pants. Her outfit is accessorized with layered belts and wristbands, and she has sturdy, knee-high boots with visible buckles and straps. The figure's posture is upright with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral, ready stance. Her hair is cut short and styled in a side-swept manner, exposing her neck and ears. The overall appearance is that of a modern pedestrian, prepared for urban environments and possibly light adventure.
description: A young adult woman in practical, fitted urban clothing with layered belts, wristbands, and knee-high boots, standing upright with arms extended. She has short, side-swept hair and a confident, ready posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed shirt with laced neckline, layered belts, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the layered accessories on the wrist and waist.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, belts, and the full length of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the layered accessories on the wrist and waist.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve shirt with laced neckline, belted high-waisted pants, layered belts, wristbands, and knee-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
